page.title: Club
page.subtitle: Facilities and staff
page.intro: Facilities make your riders develop faster, recover better, and scout smarter. Each one you build costs money every season, so invest where it fits your plan.

cost.seasonLine: Every season you pay {upkeep} upkeep + {payroll} wages = {total} CZ$. Budget for it before you upgrade.

roi.training: Your riders train {value} faster every day
roi.trainingBuild: Build it to start training your riders faster
roi.trainingNext: Next: Level {tier} → your riders would train {value} faster every day

effect.label: Effect
effect.note: Not every effect is live yet

staff.occupied: Release your current chief to hire a replacement.
staff.tierGate: Higher tiers unlock as you upgrade the facility
staff.billNote: Salary is billed at season start

errors.insufficient_funds: Not enough balance for that upgrade.
errors.max_tier: This track is already fully upgraded.
errors.role_occupied: You already have staff in this role.
errors.staff_tier_exceeds_facility: Upgrade the facility before hiring a higher-tier chief.
errors.invalid_candidate: That candidate is no longer available.
errors.network: Couldn't reach the server. Try again.

empty.title: The club is closed
empty.description: Facilities and staff aren't available yet.
